title: Swamp'd:Spored
description: A smallish pack focused around Fungal Infection:Spored.
body:
Swamp'd:Spored is a pack whose main feature is Fungal Infection:Spored. In the pack you will find features like:
Guns from timeless classics,
Tech in the forms of Create, Mekanism, and Industrial Forgoing,
And Magic with the sparkles of Iron Spells and the ruthlessness of Blood Magic.
